titleStmt.title: SII 26.201: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 201. (A.R. No. 189 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

p.hi: Vīra-Vallāladēva: Śaka 1204, Dundhubhi, Rishaba (Vaikāśi)-ba-5, Thursday, Uttirāḍa = 1282 A.D., May 6. The Śaka year was mistake for 1244.

summary.p: It records a gift of the village of Teṉpaḷinattam alias Śitakaragaṇḍanallūr, which was carved out of the dēvadāna land belonging to the deity Avināśiyāḷuḍaiyanāyaṉār of Tiruppukkoḷiyūr, by Mādappa-daṇṇāyaka, son of the mahāpradhāna Immaḍi Irāhuttarāyaṉ Perumāḷ-daṇṇāyakaṉ of the Maṭigōlaya-kula. The gift is stated to be to provide for food offerings and other services during the Immaḍi-Irāhuttarāyaṉ-sandhi instituted in the temple by the donor, for conducting the Vaikāśi-viśākham festival and for doing repairs to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman pratāpaccakravatti bhocaḷa bujapala viravallāḷatevaṟku cellāniṉṟa cakara
yāṇṭu Āyirattiruṉūṟṟunālil tuntumi samvatsarattu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu AbharakubhaRead aparapakṣattu •kṣattu pañcamiyum
viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu svastimat maṭigolayakulakamaḷa mārtthāṇṭha Immaṭi Irāku
ttarāya citakarakaṇṭa dāsivesaparadārisahodara svastiśrīmaṉumahāpradāna Immaṭi Irākuttarāyaṉ
perumāḷ taṇṇāyakkar kumāraṉ mātappa taṇṇāyakkaṉ tiruppukkoḷiyūr Aviṉāciyāḷuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟ
ku nām viṭṭa Immaṭi Irākuttarāyaṉ canti Utittu paṉṉiraṇṭānāḻikaiyil canti Oṉṟukku koyiṟ
kālāl patakku Arici Amutupaṭi taṉāl vanta cāttuppaṭi pūccuppaṭi pala viñcaṉamum koṇṭu samārā
dhaṉai paṇṇavum Immaṭi Irākuttarāyaṉ tirunāḷ vaikāci vicākam tittamāka tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷip potavum Itu
kku Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa nilattil nattamāykkit teṉpaḷi nattamāṉa citakarakaṇṭanallūr nām nā
yaṉārkku viṭṭu kuṭiyeṟṟina yil Ivvūr nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey meṉokkiya maram
kiṉokkiya kiṇaṟu Eḻuvana muḷaippaṉa maṉṟupāṭu teṇṭakuṟṟamveṭṭi muṭṭavarākavum cuṅkam carākai maṟṟu
m Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Utakapūrvamāka dhārai vārttu kuṭuttom Ivvūril mutaluḷḷa
tum nām pukkoḷiyūrkkuḷam veṭṭa Iraṇṭāyiram paṇam Iṭṭu veṭṭivikkaiyil Inta kuḷattāl vanta vaya
lil nel mutaluḷḷa nilam Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattil nām Āṇṭuvarai toṟum koṇṭu ponta
vācal paṇamum pūcaimikutiyum Ittiruppatiyil nām koṇṭa kuṟṟateṇṭamuḷḷatum Iṉṉāyaṉārkku vaikāci tiru
nāḷukkum canti Oṉṟukkum kuṭuttom Ittirunāḷukkum cantikkum pokki nikki Uḷḷa mutal tiruppaṇikku Iṭak
kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavat celvatākak kal veṭṭik kuṭuttom Itu pa
ṉmāheśvararakṣai § svadattām paradattām vā yoharetyā vasu- Airān ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāñjāyate kṛmi ḥ§
Digital edition of SII 26.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
